full_text:
Guo Da [Big Guo]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Da [Big Guo]was born in Xihe. Leader of Yellow Scarves remnants in the Bobo valley, plundered Taiyuan and Hedong in 188. Guo Da [Big Guo] was affiliated with Yellow Scarves.
